configurations.name: superhands-preview
runtimeArgs:
DEV_SCRIPT="dev"
export PORT=3001
if [ -x "node_modules/.bin/next" ] || command -v next >/dev/null 2>&1 || grep -q '"next"' package.json 2>/dev/null; then
  bun run "$DEV_SCRIPT" -- --port 3001 --hostname 0.0.0.0
else
  bun run "$DEV_SCRIPT" -- --port 3001 --host 0.0.0.0
fi
